translated: [CORNER: Lunchtime Request] Now, please listen.
By Liella!,
"UTOPIA MAGIC."
There's no real meaning, but I'm having fun waving at the contrails.
After laying out a picnic sheet, the rooftop where I sing with you is UTOPIA.
Ah, the wind slipping through the base.
Catch it now, even that sky...
It feels like I could fly.
Casting a spell on the usual scenery.
Your smile gives me happiness,
too.
If I say "I love you" out loud, everywhere becomes the most wonderful place.
Please stay by my side forever from now on.
Finally,
I can touch it as many times as I want, so let's hold our breath.
It's okay,
on the count of three.
The scenery is looking all fluffy.
Basking in the sunlight with a dazed feeling,
my precious treasures
keep increasing.
If you're here, even the future will shine.
This is the most wonderful place, enough to make me forget time.
Let those fingers stay there forever.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Lunchtime Broadcast Station, Lieraji.
[CORNER: Closing] Announcements from Love Live! Superstar!!
First, regarding music information, we have some brand new news.
Yeah.
We will be releasing a new single on Wednesday, June 17th.
Yay!
Wait, what is it?
This is so sudden.
So sudden.
Yes, this single is scheduled to include one new song and its off-vocal version, for a total of two tracks.
Details will be announced at a later date, so please look forward to it.
Next, on Wednesday, July 8th, we will release the "Liella to Musubu Project" mini-album.
This will be released in five versions: Original, Photo, Team Kodomo, Team Sports, and Team Midori.
The Original, Team Kodomo, Team Sports, and Team Midori versions will feature new illustrations,
while the Photo version will feature new photos of the cast.
This mini-album is scheduled to include four songs, including one new group song, plus their off-vocal versions for a total of eight tracks.
Also, all versions will include an advance lottery application ticket for the Love Live! Series 15th Anniversary Love Live! Fes
and Love Live! Superstar!!.
Additionally, as a first-press bonus, the Original, Team Kodomo,
Team Sports, and Team Midori versions will include stickers.
The Photo version will include purikura-style stickers.
Furthermore, as a bundle purchase bonus, you'll receive a Liella! sticker book.
Don't forget to pre-order.
And to celebrate the release of the "Liella to Musubu Project" mini-album, we've decided to hold a handover event.
Nice.
The dates are Friday, October 2nd and Friday, October 9th.
Those who pre-order or purchase the mini-album at participating stores
will be invited to the handover event via a lottery.
The cast members will vary by date, so please check the application requirements
before applying.
Please check the Love Live! Superstar!! official website for details.
Next is an announcement from the Love Live! Series Official Card Game.
The Start Deck "Love Live! Superstar!!" featuring only Liella! members and songs is coming.
The latest information will be posted on the Loveca official website and official X account,
so please keep an eye out.
Now for appearance information.
Starting April 1st, Season 2 of "Liella no Tutorial" will begin on Nippon TV.
Time Machine 3-go will continue as the program MCs from Season 1.
Catch-up streaming will be available on TVer and Nittele TADA after the broadcast.
Don't forget to check it out.
Furthermore, a live event to commemorate the broadcast, "Love Live! Superstar!! Liella no Tutoria-Live 2026," will be held on August 1st
and 2nd at LaLa arena TOKYO-BAY.
Official advance lottery applications are currently open on Ticket Pia until 11:59 PM on Sunday, March 22nd.
Please check this out as well.
For details on all the information announced today, please check the official Liella! X account
or the Love Live! Superstar!! official website.
That's all for the announcements.
